title: 10 best herbal creams for grief
description: Matricaria chamomilla, also known as chamomile, creams helps with grief because of its soothing and calming properties. The herbal extract has a sedative effect on the nervous system, reducing stress and anxiety that often accompany the grieving process. The anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties of chamomile also help to calm emotional pain and promote relaxation, making it easier to cope with the loss.
